overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female character with red hair jogging along a rocky mountain path toward a wooden shrine structure built into a cliffside. The character enters the shrine, which is decorated with colorful fabric banners, and approaches an overlook with a view of distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain cliff path with steep drop on one side

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the rocky mountain path toward the wooden shrine structure ahead

low green bushes growing on the mountainside
hazy mountain peaks visible through the atmospheric fog
rustic wooden structure with thatched roof built into the cliffside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a narrow rocky mountain path bordered by a steep cliff face on the right and a drop-off on the left. Sparse vegetation dots the mountainside while a wooden shrine structure looms ahead in the distance, with an NPC standing near its entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shrine overlook built into cliffside

events.description: character enters the wooden shrine structure built into the cliffside

agents.ego_description: entering the wooden shrine and walking through it to reach the mountain overlook

notable_agents.action: standing near the shrine entrance as the character passes by

entered.detail: thick wooden support posts wrapped with colorful purple and pink fabric
vibrant cloth ribbons tied to the wooden structure fluttering in the wind
planked wooden deck forming the floor of the shrine structure
open panoramic view of the valley and distant mountains beyond the shrine

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wooden shrine structure, passing under its thatched roof and between thick wooden pillars wrapped in colorful fabric banners. Moving through the sheltered platform, the character approaches an overlook with a sweeping view of the misty valley and distant mountains beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged mountain trail into the sheltered sanctuary of a cliffside shrine. It begins with the character jogging along a narrow rocky path, flanked by a steep cliff face and a sharp drop-off amidst sparse vegetation. As the character advances, the path leads directly toward a wooden shrine structure where an NPC stands waiting at the entrance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under a thatched roof and between thick wooden pillars adorned with colorful fabric banners. Finally, the movement opens up from the sheltered platform to reveal a sweeping overlook of a misty valley and distant mountains.
